title: cimetech 12PCs Led Tea Lights with Timer, Electric Flickering Battery Operated Led Candles Tea Lights with Remote Control for Home, Room, Table, Halloween, Christmas Decoration
features: 【BATTERY INCLUDED】Each set contains 12 x timer tea lights(Dia3.7cm X H 2cm) with CR2032 batteries included and installed, using high quality batteries that last 1.5-2 times longer than similar candles about 60+ hours(max brightness), as acknowledged by many satisfied customers, this ensures that the led tea lights work last during your holidays.

【TIMER FUNCTION】Save you the trouble of switching them on and off every day and save battery power to keep the Led Tea Lights burning longer. In addition to the warm atmosphere, you can also control them intelligently. You receive a 10-button remote control with all Led candles. You can set your Led tea lights to a 2/4/6/8 hour timer, adjust brightness or change flicker mode.

【LIVE CHARM】The LED tea lights from cimetech imitate real candles with soft, enhanced flickering and melting edges. Warm light creates a romantic atmosphere when used as dinner, party, wedding, birthday, Christmas home decoration.

【SAFE - NO FIRE HAZARD, HASSLE & POLLUTION】The battery operated timer led tea lights can be used in bedrooms, lounges, bathrooms, etc. You no longer have to deal with the hassle of cleaning up dripping candles or worry about falling asleep without having blown out the candles.

【PERFECT DECORATION】The flickering, flameless timer tea lights are ideal for decorations. They can be used in votive holders, placed on dining tables or on the windowsill. Perfect for decorating romantic, savoury dinners, parties, birthdays, Halloween or Christmas.
description: Product Description Cimetech 12 Led tea lights with timer Timer, Batteries included, Durable, Melting edge design, Flameless, Flickering Tea Lights Candles Battery Operated Flameless battery tea lights candles are with warm yellow light, they come with batteries included and last a long time with their flickering light being very realistic.
